string 2: ...Is it alive?
What is it...? I've never seen a Digimon like this before.
No, you're wrong... This isn't a Digimon.
Huh...? Then what is it...?
It must be... a "human"!
This... is a human?
Get back, both of you!

No ordinary human could reach this place! That means you 
must be dangerous—an intruder!
Some "gubmint building"... exploded? What're you talking about?
What do you want? Wait... Could you be after the "egg"...?
Prepare yourself, egg thief!
Calm down, Minerva...
This human just looks confused to me.
Wh-What? Another intruder?!
You! You must be this egg thief's accomplice!
Minnie!
N-Nervy!
S-Say, human! Is that your friend?!
It was there when the building blew up!{next}
Wait. Did it follow me here?{next}
It might be a serious anomaly...{next}

N-Not sure what you're talking about, but you're basically
saying it's bad news, right?!

If something happens to that egg, the human world might
be affected too!
Agh! This is so frustrating! There's no time to explain everything!
If you aren't that shadow's friend... Can you help us? Please?!

There's no signal. Is there something in this place that's
causing some sort of interference?
No! Stop it! That egg is very important!
Please...! I'm sorry I called you a thief!
An agent always answers a cry for help!{next}
Gimme a little more time to think...!
I dunno WHAT'S going on!
No! Hurry...! The egg...!
Stop that thing!
Huh?!
Aaagh!
Th-The egg!
The precious egg of the Great Guardian...
The one meant to save this world...
EGG THIEF!
Hmm... Seems we have another mess on our hands.

A conflict over the natural laws of this world...
*sigh* I guess we can't stay entirely uninvolved.

Hey, are you even listening? You know this is all
happening in your domain...
...Homeros.
